title: Graph MCP spec — human-readable HTML render now live
summary: GitHub Pages with .nojekyll was serving /graph/mcp.md as raw text/plain, leaving the D-258 architecture spec unreadable in a browser. Shipped /graph/mcp.html as the human render of the canonical Markdown — same nine sections (Frame, Surface, Auth, Eval Gates, Threat Model R17, Roadmap, Worked Example, Schema, Provenance), engineering-blog typography, rt-stamp pill, explicit 'Source: /graph/mcp.md' link near the masthead. The .md remains the AI-readable source of truth.
